specific_mechanism: Continuous homing-vector update from heterogeneous cues with documented dominance hierarchy.
llm_application: CATA-AGENT: long-running LLM agent maintaining a single running homing-vector state from polarization-style alignment + step-count token-budget + landmark-anchor tool successes with fixed dominance hierarchy.
novelty_claim: Adjacent to VLN literature (FLAME, STMR) and embodied navigation, but specific dominance-hierarchy fusion at agent state is open.
